emails.subject: RE: Non-Terminated Counterparties
emails.body: Stacey, The Enabling Agreement (96000724) applies to deal #'s: 3689.03 3689.04 As for the 1999 Enabling agreement (96021406) here are the following ref. #'s: 373511.01 373512.01 439609.01 439608.01 585276.01 585277.01 620557.01 709317.01 If you need any other, please let me know. Thanks, Kimberly

emails.subject: RE: Non-Terminated Counterparties
emails.body: Do you know if the rest of these auto-terminations apply to all deals we have with this counterparties, or just certain deals? Please look into them and let me know as soon as possible. Stacey

emails.subject: RE: Non-Terminated Counterparties
emails.body: I will check into it right now. Kimberly
